summary: Iteration 73 - Planning Tab Gantt Chart Testing Complete. All major features verified working: Alert bar (retard/conflit/paiement counts), View toggles (Jour/Semaine/Mois), Zoom controls, Status filters (Tous/Confirmes/En cours/Retards), Vehicle search, Legend, Today column highlight, Reservation bars with color-coding, Conflict detection, Month navigation, and Reservation popup/modal with quick actions.

integration_issues.flow: Empty cell click to create reservation
integration_issues.issue: onCreateReservation prop is not passed to GanttChart component, so clicking empty cells does not trigger create reservation flow
integration_issues.note: Users can still create reservations via 'Creer Reservation' button in Gestion tab

action_items: OPTIONAL: Pass onCreateReservation prop to GanttChart to enable creating reservations by clicking empty cells
critical_code_review_comments: GanttChart.tsx: Well-implemented Gantt chart with all requested features - view toggles, zoom, filters, legend, conflict detection, today highlight
Conflict detection logic correctly identifies overlapping reservations and marks them with red bars and borders
Alert bar correctly calculates overdue, conflict, and unpaid counts from reservation data
View toggles (Jour/Semaine/Mois) correctly compute different date ranges
Zoom controls properly scale cell widths and row heights
Status filters correctly filter reservations by status
Today column has red vertical line indicator inside cells
Available slots (no reservation, not weekend) shown with green tint and dot
Reservation bars show user name on start day with proper text shadow for readability

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All major features working, one minor integration gap

context_for_next_testing_agent: Planning tab Gantt chart fully tested. Features verified: 1) Alert bar with retard(s)/conflit(s)/paiement(s) counts, 2) View toggles Jour/Semaine/Mois, 3) Zoom controls +/- with percentage display, 4) Status filters Tous/Confirmes/En cours/Retards, 5) Vehicle search input, 6) Legend with all status colors, 7) Today button resets to current month, 8) Month navigation arrows, 9) Clicking reservation bar opens ReservationActionModal with quick actions, 10) Today column highlighted with blue header and red vertical line in cells, 11) Conflict detection shows red bars with red border, 12) Available slots have green tint. Minor gap: onCreateReservation not passed so empty cell clicks don't trigger creation.

alert_bar.retard_count: PASS - Shows '1 retard(s)' with red chip
alert_bar.conflit_count: PASS - Shows '2 conflit(s)' with orange chip
alert_bar.paiement_count: PASS - Shows '3 paiement(s)' with yellow chip

planning_tab_gantt_chart.vehicle_search: PASS - Filters vehicles by name (tested with 'BMW')

legend.conflit: PASS - Red square with border shown

planning_tab_gantt_chart.today_button: PASS - Resets to current month view

grid_display.day_headers: PASS - Shows day abbreviations (LU, MA, ME, etc.) and numbers
grid_display.today_highlight: PASS - Day 8 has blue background in header
grid_display.today_vertical_line: PASS - Red vertical line in today's column cells
grid_display.weekend_styling: PASS - Weekend days have gray background

reservation_bars.color_coding: PASS - Red=conflict/cancelled, Blue=active, Green=confirmed, Yellow=pending, Purple=pending_cash
reservation_bars.user_name_display: PASS - Shows user's first name on start day
reservation_bars.conflict_border: PASS - Conflicting reservations have red border

planning_tab_gantt_chart.available_slots: PASS - Green tinted cells with small green dot
planning_tab_gantt_chart.reservation_click: PASS - Opens ReservationActionModal with quick actions (Confirmer, Demarrer, Terminer, Annuler, Details)
planning_tab_gantt_chart.empty_cell_click: INFO - Does not trigger create reservation (onCreateReservation not passed)

playwright_tests_performed: Admin login with admin-geneva@logirent.ch
Navigate to /agency-app/reservations
Click Planning tab
Verify alert bar shows retard(s), conflit(s), paiement(s) counts
Test Jour view toggle - shows single day
Test Semaine view toggle - shows 7 days
Test Mois view toggle - shows full month
Test Confirmes filter - filters to confirmed reservations
Test En cours filter - filters to active reservations
Test Retards filter - filters to overdue reservations
Test Tous filter - resets to show all
Test Aujourd'hui button - resets to current month
Test vehicle search with 'BMW' - filters to BMW only
Verify legend items (Disponible, Confirmee, En cours, En attente, Especes, Conflit)
Verify grid header shows VEHICULE and day columns
Verify today column (day 8) is highlighted
Click on reservation bar - opens ReservationActionModal
Verify modal shows quick actions (Confirmer, Demarrer, Terminer, Annuler)
Test zoom controls (+/-)
Test horizontal scrolling of grid
